title: Best Beginner Fruit
description: Choose a fruit with easy farming, good range, and simple damage to progress faster early game.

title: How to Level Up Fast
description: Focus on quests, kill mobs efficiently, move island by island, and use active codes whenever possible.

title: Best Sword Build
description: Use your strongest sword, invest your stats carefully, and avoid wasting resources early.

title: How to Farm Bosses
description: Learn boss spawn locations, use a strong build, and repeat the easiest profitable bosses.

title: Best Farming Strategy
description: Farm grouped enemies, use AoE attacks, and reset quickly to maximize XP gain.

title: Common Beginner Mistakes
description: Avoid wasting stats, buying weak items, or skipping quests that give good rewards.

title: How to Use Codes Properly
description: Always redeem codes early to gain boosts, resets, or free rewards that help progression.

title: Best Fruit for Grinding
description: Choose fruits with area damage and fast cooldowns to farm enemies efficiently.

title: Best Sword for Early Game
description: Use fast and simple swords that allow consistent damage output and easy combos.

title: How to Progress Faster
description: Stick to main quests, avoid unnecessary fights, and focus on efficient leveling paths.

title: What to Do After Starting
description: Follow quests, collect rewards, and upgrade your stats based on your chosen build.

title: How to Save Resources
description: Avoid spending early on weak upgrades, and save currency for better gear later.

title: Best Stats to Upgrade
description: Focus on damage stats first, then survivability, depending on your playstyle.

title: Fruit vs Sword: What to Choose
description: Fruits offer AoE and farming, swords give strong single-target damage—choose based on your goals.

title: Fastest Way to Get Stronger
description: Use boosts, follow tier lists, and upgrade only the most effective weapons and fruits.

title: Best Solo Farming Method
description: Pick easy enemies, use safe positioning, and avoid unnecessary risks to farm consistently.

title: How to Prepare for Boss Fights
description: Upgrade your gear, learn patterns, and use the best abilities before engaging bosses.

title: Early Game Survival Tips
description: Stay mobile, avoid strong enemies, and upgrade health stats if needed.

title: Mid Game Progression Guide
description: Switch to stronger builds, farm bosses, and optimize your gear choices.

title: Late Game Farming Tips
description: Focus on high-reward bosses, optimize your build, and farm efficiently with strong abilities.

title: Best Build for Beginners
description: Use simple builds with high damage and low complexity to learn the game mechanics.

title: How to Grind Efficiently
description: Group enemies, chain attacks, and minimize downtime between fights.

title: Best Way to Use Boosts
description: Activate boosts during farming sessions or boss runs for maximum benefit.

title: How to Avoid Wasting Stats
description: Plan your build before upgrading and avoid random stat distribution.

title: Best Strategy for New Players
description: Focus on learning mechanics, completing quests, and upgrading gradually.
